Hunspell source vendored for FrankenKey autocorrect.

Source: https://github.com/hunspell/hunspell
Snapshot source used during integration: Hunspell upstream master source tree, src/hunspell/*.
License: tri-licensed MPL-1.1 OR GPL-2.0-or-later OR LGPL-2.1-or-later; FrankenKey uses the GPL-2.0-or-later option, compatible with this GPLv3 project.
License text: vendor/hunspell/license.hunspell

The JNI wrapper in vendor/hunspell/java/jni/ is FrankenKey project code.
